item.title: NASCAR Chairman Jim France To Step Down as CEO, Remain Chairman, Sources Say
item.description: According to sources, huge shifts are happening in the top ranks of NASCAR leadership.

item.title: 2026 NHL Conn Smythe Trophy Odds: Colorado's Nathan MacKinnon Favored
item.description: Which player will win the Conn Smythe Trophy at the end of the Stanley Cup playoffs? Here are the latest odds.

item.title: 2027 Super Bowl Odds: Did Favored Rams Fall After Ty Simpson Pick?
item.description: Let’s see who is favored to take home the Lombardi Trophy next season following the first round of the NFL Draft.

item.title: NFL Draft: The Best Player Taken at All 32 2nd-Round Picks Since 2000
item.description: Who was the best player taken at every second-round pick since 2000? We answer that question here.

item.title: Colin Cowherd on Rams Taking QB in NFL Draft: 'The Real Winner is Ty Simpson'
item.description: Were the Los Angeles Rams wise to select QB Ty Simpson with the No. 13 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft? Colin Cowherd made the case.
